text:
……無駄だ。声は届かん。
彼女はすでに【深遠なる闇】だ。

……そうだ。それでいい。
彼女にもはや、言葉は通じん。

だが、彼女が身の内に
【深遠なる闇】を閉じ込めている今こそ
……彼女の本懐を果たせる時だ。

...It's no use. My voice won't reach her. She
has already become the Profound Darkness.

I see; That's good.
Words no longer get through to her.

Now that the Profound Darkness is imbedded
in her body, it's time to carry out her
cherished desire.
